subject: VPN connected but internal websites do not load
description: VPN client shows connected; browser times out on intranet URLs that worked last week.

ts_steps.title: VPN client routes
ts_steps.action: Open VPN statistics; confirm intranet subnets listed.

ts_steps.title: Disconnect reconnect
ts_steps.action: Disconnect 10 s; reconnect; try alternate gateway if offered.

ts_steps.title: DNS suffix
ts_steps.action: Confirm corporate DNS suffix search list on VPN adapter.

ts_steps.title: Test by IP
ts_steps.action: Browse internal server by IP — if works, DNS over VPN broken.

ts_steps.title: Adapter metric
ts_steps.action: Ensure VPN routes beat split paths for corporate ranges.

ts_steps.title: Clear SSL state
ts_steps.action: Internet Options → Content → Clear SSL state.

ts_steps.title: Proxy settings
ts_steps.action: Settings → Network → Proxy — manual off unless PAC required.

ts_steps.title: Hotspot test
ts_steps.action: If allowed, non-VPN hotspot to compare (only for isolation).

ts_steps.title: Escalation package
ts_steps.action: route print -4, ipconfig /all while VPN up for network team.

internal_information: Split tunnel, DNS, SSL inspection, missing routes.
